title: lonicera gynochlamydea subsp. gynochlamydea
intro: Lonicera gynochlamydea subsp. gynochlamydea is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae, commonly known as the Himalayan honeysuckle or sweet honeysuckle. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lonicera gynochlamydea subsp. gynochlamydea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Lonicera gynochlamydea subsp. gynochlamydea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine practices.
